brief_title: Dabrafenib With Trametinib in the Adjuvant Treatment of High-risk BRAF V600 Mutation-positive Melanoma (COMBI-AD).
official_title: COMBI-AD: A Phase III Randomized Double Blind Study of Dabrafenib (GSK2118436) in COMBInation With Trametinib (GSK1120212) Versus Two Placebos in the ADjuvant Treatment of High-risk BRAF V600 Mutation-positive Melanoma After Surgical Resection

outcomes.title: Percentage of Participants With Relapse-free Survival (RFS) Events
outcomes.description: Relapse-Free Survival (RFS) was defined as the time from randomization to disease recurrence or death from any cause. RFS events included loco-regional recurrence, distant metastases, new primary melanoma, and death without prior documented recurrence; such deaths were counted as events and not cens

arms.title: Censored, follow-up ended at the time of Primary Completion Date
Censored, follow-up ongoing at the time of Primary Completion Date

outcomes.title: Relapse-free Survival (RFS)
outcomes.description: Relapse-Free Survival (RFS) was defined as the time from randomization to disease recurrence or death from any cause. RFS events included loco-regional recurrence, distant metastases, new primary melanoma, and death without prior documented recurrence; such deaths were counted as events and not cens

outcomes.title: Percentage of Participants With Overall Survival (OS) Events
outcomes.description: Censoring was performed using the date of last known contact for those who were alive at the time of analysis.

outcomes.title: Overall Survival (OS)
outcomes.description: Overall Survival (OS) was defined as the interval from randomization to the date of death, irrespective of the cause of death. Censoring was performed using the date of last known contact for those who were alive at the time of analysis.

outcomes.title: Percentage of Participants With Distant Metastasis-free Survival (DMFS) Events
outcomes.description: Distant metastasis-free survival (DMFS) was defined as the time from randomization to the first occurrence of distant metastasis or death, whichever occurred first, if death preceded documented recurrence. outcomes.title: Percentage of Participants With Freedom From Relapse (FFR) Events
outcomes.description: The first appearance of local/distant metastasis or mortality due to disease recurrence or toxicity were used as events. outcomes.title: Freedom From Relapse (FFR)
outcomes.description: Freedom from relapse (FFR) was defined as the interval from randomization to local or distant recurrence with censoring of patients dying from causes other than melanoma or treatment -related toxicity at the date of death. outcomes.title: All Collected Deaths
outcomes.description:
Pre-treatment deaths were collected from day of participant's informed consent to the day before first dose of study medication.

On-treatment deaths were collected from first dose of study treatment to 30 days after last dose of study medication (on-treatment), up to approximately 12 months.
